onClick: {{storeValue('teamMailoutRunning', true); storeValue('teamMailoutStatus', `Preparing ${ToggleTestMode.isSelected ? 'test' : 'production'} captain mailout...`); GenerateContactSheets.run(() => { storeValue('teamMailoutStatus', 'Captain mailout sent successfully.'); storeValue('teamMailoutRunning', false); }, (error) => { const message = `Error: ${error?.message || 'Unknown error occurred'}`; storeValue('teamMailoutStatus', message); storeValue('teamMailoutRunning', false); showAlert(message, 'error'); });}}
